# AV Detailing

> Premium mobile car, RV, boat, and aircraft detailing in Baton Rouge, Louisiana. Ceramic coating, paint correction, and interior/exterior detailing — we come to you.

Business: AV Detailing
Website: https://avdetailing.net
Phone: (225) 521-6264
Location: Baton Rouge, Louisiana
Service areas: Baton Rouge, Highland Road, Shenandoah, Gonzales, Prairieville, Denham Springs, Walker, Zachary, Central

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of AV Detailing mobile services in Baton Rouge.
- [About](/about): Our story, values, and why customers choose us.
- [Services](/services): Full list of detailing services and packages.
- [Memberships](/memberships): Recurring detailing plans (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly).
- [Gallery](/gallery): Before-and-after photos of completed work.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Customer testimonials and 5-star ratings.
- [Service Areas](/service-areas): Cities and neighborhoods we serve.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, address, and contact form.

## Car detailing

- [Car Detailing Baton Rouge](/car-detailing-baton-rouge): Full mobile car detailing service.
- [Mobile Car Detailing](/mobile-car-detailing-baton-rouge): We come to your home or office.
- [Ceramic Coating](/ceramic-coating-baton-rouge): System X 3-, 6-, and 10-year ceramic coatings.
- [Paint Correction](/paint-correction-baton-rouge): 1-, 2-, and 3-step paint correction.
- [Interior Detailing](/interior-detailing-baton-rouge): Deep interior cleaning and protection.
- [Exterior Detailing](/exterior-detailing-baton-rouge): Wash, decontamination, and polish.
- [Headlight Restoration](/headlight-restoration-baton-rouge): Restore cloudy headlights.
- [Odor Removal](/odor-removal-baton-rouge): Eliminate persistent vehicle odors.
- [Pet Hair Removal](/pet-hair-removal-baton-rouge): Specialized pet hair extraction.
- [Engine Bay Cleaning](/engine-bay-cleaning-baton-rouge): Safe engine bay detailing.

## RV detailing

- [RV Detailing](/rv-detailing-baton-rouge): Full-service RV cleaning.
- [Mobile RV Detailing](/mobile-rv-detailing-baton-rouge): On-site RV detailing.
- [RV Ceramic Coating](/rv-ceramic-coating-baton-rouge): Long-term paint protection for RVs.
- [RV Interior Detailing](/rv-interior-detailing-baton-rouge): Interior RV cleaning.
- [RV Roof Cleaning](/rv-roof-cleaning-baton-rouge): Safe roof cleaning and treatment.
- [RV Oxidation Removal](/rv-oxidation-removal-baton-rouge): Restore faded RV exteriors.

## Boat detailing

- [Boat Detailing](/boat-detailing-baton-rouge): Full boat detailing services.
- [Mobile Boat Detailing](/mobile-boat-detailing-baton-rouge): At-marina boat detailing.
- [Boat Ceramic Coating](/boat-ceramic-coating-baton-rouge): Marine-grade ceramic protection.
- [Gelcoat Restoration](/gelcoat-restoration-baton-rouge): Restore faded gelcoat.
- [Hull Cleaning](/hull-cleaning-baton-rouge): Below-waterline hull cleaning.
- [Pontoon Cleaning](/pontoon-cleaning-baton-rouge): Specialized pontoon care.

## Aircraft detailing

- [Aircraft Detailing](/aircraft-detailing-baton-rouge): Full aircraft cleaning services.
- [Aircraft Cleaning](/aircraft-cleaning-baton-rouge): Exterior aircraft wash.
- [Aircraft Interior Detailing](/aircraft-interior-detailing-baton-rouge): Cabin cleaning and treatment.
- [Aircraft Paint Protection](/aircraft-paint-protection-baton-rouge): Protective coatings for aircraft.
